list.title: SkillHone: A Harness for Continual Agent Skill Evolution Through Persistent Decision History

extra.desc: SkillHone enables continuous evolution of agent skills by maintaining persistent decision histories and incorporating practice feedback for improved performance across research and tool-mediated analysis tasks.

list.title: DataEvolver: Self-Evolving Multi-Agent Data Construction for Text-Rich Image Generation

extra.desc: DataEvolver is a self-evolving multi-agent framework that improves text-rich image generation by leveraging feedback from rejected samples to iteratively enhance data quality.

list.title: MuSViT: A Foundation Vision Model for Sheet Music Representation

extra.desc: MuSViT is a vision transformer-based foundation model pre-trained on millions of sheet music pages that demonstrates superior performance in music score recognition and symbol detection tasks through both linear probing and fine-tuning approaches.

list.title: Scenes as Objects, Not Primitives: Instance-Structured 3D Tokenization from Unposed Views

extra.desc: A feed-forward framework decomposes 3D scenes into instance-structured token groups from multi-view images, enabling direct object-level reconstruction, segmentation, and manipulation without 3D annotations.

list.title: RedVox: Safety and Fairness Gaps in Speech Models Across Languages

extra.desc: Multilingual safety and fairness benchmark for speech models reveals persistent vulnerabilities across languages and naturalistic conditions.

list.title: GEAR: Guided End-to-End AutoRegression for Image Synthesis

extra.desc: GEAR trains a vector-quantized tokenizer and autoregressive generator jointly end-to-end using representation alignment, overcoming non-differentiability issues through a dual read-out approach that improves convergence speed and feature quality.

list.title: Little Brains, Big Feats: Exploring Compact Language Models

extra.desc: Small language models can effectively perform retrieval-augmented generation tasks directly on-device without GPU acceleration.

list.title: Multi-Block Diffusion Language Models

extra.desc: Multi-Block Diffusion Language Models extend single-block diffusion to concurrent block decoding with improved training strategies and optimized decoding algorithms.

list.title: Reinforcement Learning with Metacognitive Feedback Elicits Faithful Uncertainty Expression in LLMs

extra.desc: Reinforcement learning with metacognitive feedback and metacognitive data selection improve large language model calibration by enabling accurate self-assessment of performance and uncertainty.

list.title: TerraDiT-Ω: Unified Spatial Control for Satellite Image Synthesis with Any Geospatial Primitive

extra.desc: TerraDiT-Ω generates satellite imagery from native geospatial primitives using Geometry-Aware Local Attention, enabling flexible conditioning and improved downstream geospatial tasks.

list.title: PhotoQuilt: Training-Free Arbitrary-Resolution Photomosaics via Bootstrapped Tiled Denoising

extra.desc: PhotoQuilt is a training-free framework that generates high-resolution photomosaics by combining global layout composition with separate tile generation in latent space, overcoming limitations of diffusion models in balancing local detail and global structure.

list.title: BrainJanus: A Unified Model for Understanding and Generation across Brain, Vision, and Language

extra.desc: BrainJanus represents the first unified brain model integrating brain, vision, and language through a shared Omni space, enabling bidirectional mapping between neural activity and sensory stimuli via a tokenized representation and autoregressive architecture.

list.title: BlockPilot: Instance-Adaptive Policy Learning for Diffusion-based Speculative Decoding

extra.desc: Speculative decoding with adaptive block size selection improves inference efficiency by predicting optimal block sizes from prefilling representations, achieving significant speedup with minimal overhead.

list.title: Xiaomi-GUI-0 Technical Report

extra.desc: A native multimodal GUI agent trained in real-device environments demonstrates superior performance and stability compared to traditional benchmark-based approaches.

list.title: PolyFlow: Continuous Topology Embedding Flow Matching for Artist-style Mesh Generation

extra.desc: PolyFlow introduces a continuous mesh representation using a topology embedder and applies flow-matching with Transformers for parallel mesh generation, achieving faster inference and precise resolution control compared to autoregressive methods.

list.title: MemLearner: Learning to Query Context memory for Video World Models

extra.desc: MemLearner improves video world models by using learning-based adaptive context querying with query tokens to enhance scene consistency and memory in long video sequences with occlusions and dynamic objects.

list.title: Orca: The World is in Your Mind

extra.desc: Orca establishes a unified world latent space through next-state-prediction modeling using multimodal data and demonstrates superior performance in downstream tasks compared to specialized baselines.

list.title: AVTok: 1D Unified Tokenization for Holistic Audio-Video Generation

extra.desc: AVTok is a unified tokenizer for audio-video generation that uses a dual-stream transformer architecture with shared encoder-decoder and modal-specific queries to create compact one-dimensional latent representations.

list.title: Evolution Fine-Tuning: Learning to Discover Across 371 Optimization Tasks

extra.desc: Evolutionary fine-tuning enables large language models to develop cross-task problem-solving capabilities by learning from search trajectories, demonstrating improved performance on mathematical conjectures and optimization tasks.

list.title: DOPD: Dual On-policy Distillation

extra.desc: DOPD addresses privilege illusion in on-policy distillation by dynamically routing token-level supervision between teacher and student policies based on advantage gaps and probabilities, improving capability transfer in large and vision-language models.

list.title: Dockerless: Environment-Free Program Verifier for Coding Agents

list.title: LUMOS: A Semantic Operating-System Layer for Accessibility-Grounded AI Agents

list.title: MirrorPPR: Exemplar-Based Portrait Photo Retouching

list.title: Delayed Verification Destabilizes Multi-Agent LLM Belief: Instability Thresholds and Optimal Corrector Placement

list.title: Drop-Then-Recovery: How Redundant Are Vision-Language-Action Models?
